101010101011001000111110110111110001000000110011001110011100010100101 - ASI: 27

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  110 = 1 * 10
  0010 = 00 * 10
  0110 = 0 * 110
  1010 = 10 * 10
  1110 = 11 * 10
  00101 = 0010 * 1
  01110 = 0 * 1110
  000110 = 00 * 0110
  001000 = 0010 * 00
  101010 = 10 * 1010
  111110 = 11 * 1110
  11001000 = 11 * 001000
  110111110 = 110 * 111110
  0001100110 = 000110 * 0110
  0010100101 = 00101 * 00101
  0111001110 = 01110 * 01110
  1010101010 = 1010 * 101010
  111110110111110 = 111110 * 110111110
  0010000001100110 = 001000 * 0001100110
  101010101011001000 = 1010101010 * 11001000
  01110011100010100101 = 0111001110 * 0010100101
  101010101011001000111110110111110 = 101010101011001000 * 111110110111110
  001000000110011001110011100010100101 = 0010000001100110 * 01110011100010100101
  101010101011001000111110110111110001000000110011001110011100010100101 = 101010101011001000111110110111110 * 001000000110011001110011100010100101
